scripts.release-admin: shorebird release android -t lib/main_admin.dart --artifact apk -- --target-platform android-arm64 && mv build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/admin-release.apk
scripts.release-customer: shorebird release android -t lib/main_customer.dart --artifact apk -- --target-platform android-arm64 && mv build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/customer-release.apk
scripts.build-and-deploy: npm run release-admin && npm run release-customer && npm run deploy-apps
